summary: Frontend-only testing of the 6 niche dynamic routes after the routing fix. All routes now render NichePage (no more redirect to home). Verified slug-prop wiring, SEO meta tags, niche-specific hero/problem/cases content, universal sections, CTAs, and home '/' still works. 6/6 niches pass core requirements.

clinicas-esteticas.headline_ok: Marketing y IA para | clínicas y centros estéticos

odontologia.headline_ok: Pacientes para tratamientos | que valen la pena

inmobiliarias.headline_ok: Visitas calificadas para tus | propiedades premium

canonical_link_note.verdict: Mismatch between review_request and actual code behavior. The code (NichePage.jsx line 348) sets canonical per slug, which is the SEO-correct behavior (each niche page should have its own canonical, not all pointing to the same URL). Flagging for main-agent decision: either update review_request expectation or change code to point to a single URL.

badge_rendering_note: Badge text is rendered with CSS `uppercase` (e.g. 'SECTOR ESTÉTICO · HIGH-TICKET'). Underlying source string matches niches.js. This is intentional styling, not a bug.
action_items: Optional: align canonical link href with review_request spec (currently per-slug, request asks for fixed /premium-lead-system). Recommend keeping per-slug for SEO.
critical_code_review_comments: NichePage.jsx is solid: slug fallback via useParams works as backup; Navigate to '/' on missing niche is the right guard.

useEffect for SEO mutates document.head directly without cleanup — on unmount the canonical/meta tags retain niche-specific values. If user navigates from /abogados to /, title and canonical persist until next route updates them. Consider adding a return cleanup or using react-helmet-async.
niches.js data file is large but well-structured; could be split per-niche if it grows further (currently ~700 lines, near the 700-line threshold).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Niche routing fully working as of iteration 10. The only open question is canonical URL strategy — review_request says fixed URL, code uses per-slug. Decision needed from main agent. Badge appears uppercase but source data is mixed-case (CSS transform).
